item.title: 1954 Arnolt MG Drophead Coupe Showcase
item.description: A look at the 1954 Arnolt MG Drophead Coupe, a rare classic with distinctive styling and a memorable open-top design. What details stand out most to you?

media:content.media:title: 1954 Arnolt MG Drophead Coupe Showcase
media:content.media:description: A look at the 1954 Arnolt MG Drophead Coupe, a rare classic with distinctive styling and a memorable open-top design. What details stand out most to you?

item.title: The Golden Giant: ’58 Roadmaster Loaded with Chrome
item.description: A look at the 1958 Roadmaster and its standout chrome details. This classic showcases the styling and presence that made the era memorable. What details stand out most to you?

media:content.media:description: A look at the 1958 Roadmaster and its standout chrome details. This classic showcases the styling and presence that made the era memorable. What details stand out most to you?

item.title: The Elegance of a 1955 Hudson
item.description: A showcase of a classic 1955 Hudson Hornet, highlighting its styling, craftsmanship, and distinctive presence from the era. The video explores the details that made mid-century American cars stand out. What design feature defines elegance in a classic car for you?

media:content.media:title: The Elegance of a 1955 Hudson
media:content.media:description: A showcase of a classic 1955 Hudson Hornet, highlighting its styling, craftsmanship, and distinctive presence from the era. The video explores the details that made mid-century American cars stand out. What design feature defines elegance in a classic car for you?

item.title: Unique '62 Dodge: Dad-Loved Design?
item.description: A look at a unique 1962 Dodge and the design that made it memorable. The video highlights its classic styling and the personal connection behind the car. What details stand out to you?

media:content.media:description: A look at a unique 1962 Dodge and the design that made it memorable. The video highlights its classic styling and the personal connection behind the car. What details stand out to you?

item.title: 1967 Ford Galaxie 500 4-Door Sedan
item.description: A look at the 1967 Ford Galaxie 500 4-Door Sedan, presented as exactly like Dad’s car. This classic Ford stands out with its four-door sedan body style and period character. What details stand out most?

media:content.media:description: A look at the 1967 Ford Galaxie 500 4-Door Sedan, presented as exactly like Dad’s car. This classic Ford stands out with its four-door sedan body style and period character. What details stand out most?

item.title: 1969 Ford Mustang Restomod 900+ HP
item.description: A 1969 Ford Mustang restomod with more than 900 horsepower is featured in this showcase. The video highlights its build, performance focus, and standout details. What features stand out most to you?

media:content.media:description: A 1969 Ford Mustang restomod with more than 900 horsepower is featured in this showcase. The video highlights its build, performance focus, and standout details. What features stand out most to you?

item.title: Hear the Purr of a Restored '60 Ford Thunderbird
item.description: A restored 1960 Ford Thunderbird is brought to life, showcasing its engine sound, styling, and classic presence. The video highlights restoration work and the driving character of this vintage model. What’s your favorite classic car engine sound?

media:content.media:title: Hear the Purr of a Restored '60 Ford Thunderbird
media:content.media:description: A restored 1960 Ford Thunderbird is brought to life, showcasing its engine sound, styling, and classic presence. The video highlights restoration work and the driving character of this vintage model. What’s your favorite classic car engine sound?

item.title: 1931 Ford Huckster Delivery Wagon

item.title: 1965 Ford Mustang 2+2 Fastback
